item.title: The Secret to Making Your Pond Look INCREDIBLE
item.description: Want to know the secret to making your pond look absolutely incredible? 🌿 In this video, I show you exactly how I transformed our pond in just minutes using pond dye and a simple DIY tool I built to clear out algae. The results were amazing, and now the water looks crystal-clear and vibrant blue.

media:content.media:title: The Secret to Making Your Pond Look INCREDIBLE
media:content.media:description: Want to know the secret to making your pond look absolutely incredible? 🌿 In this video, I show you exactly how I transformed our pond in just minutes using pond dye and a simple DIY tool I built to clear out algae. The results were amazing, and now the water looks crystal-clear and vibrant blue.

item.title: It's still loud though
item.description: There's not enough air on the tank, but the horn is still loud.

media:content.media:title: It's still loud though
media:content.media:description: There's not enough air on the tank, but the horn is still loud.

item.title: You won't ever catch me in an electric car
item.description: I don't want an electric car, I want that oil leaking car!

media:content.media:title: You won't ever catch me in an electric car
media:content.media:description: I don't want an electric car, I want that oil leaking car!

item.title: It's hard to explain...
item.description: When the security asks me why I'm getting a complaint for noise at 1am, I don't know what to say 🤣

media:content.media:title: It's hard to explain...
media:content.media:description: When the security asks me why I'm getting a complaint for noise at 1am, I don't know what to say 🤣

item.title: This 2nd Gen was worth every penny

item.description: It's not for sale, and I'm not planning to sell it

item.title: I put a remote tailgate horn in my truck
item.description: I will blast it everytime someone toots their horn at me

item.title: Yes you can
item.description: You can pick up anybody's girlfriend in this car

item.title: Don’t touch it...
item.description: Don't touch my corvette, just admire it

item.title: The best car!
item.description: Corvette c6 is the best car, prove me wrong

item.title: Karen neighbors always complaining
item.description: My neighbors always complain that my Corvette is too loud

item.title: Look at this truck
item.description: This is the cleanest 454 Dually Squarebody in the Country

media:content.media:title: Look at this truck
media:content.media:description: This is the cleanest 454 Dually Squarebody in the Country

item.title: I Bought the Cleanest 454 Dually Squarebody in the Country
item.description: I picked up a fully restored 1986 Sierra 3500, and this thing is as clean as they come. In this video, I take it for a quick drive, go over the details, and show everything that makes this square body stand out from the rest.

media:content.media:title: I Bought the Cleanest 454 Dually Squarebody in the Country
media:content.media:description: I picked up a fully restored 1986 Sierra 3500, and this thing is as clean as they come. In this video, I take it for a quick drive, go over the details, and show everything that makes this square body stand out from the rest.
